steps.title: Identify the missing table value
steps.content: The value $a$ is the y-value when $x=3$. Since the equation is given, the fastest method is direct substitution.

steps.title: Graph-check in Desmos
steps.content: Graph $y=4\cdot2^x+5$ and add the vertical line $x=3$. The graph gives $y=37$, so choice B is correct.
